title: malvastrum coromandelianum
intro: Malvastrum coromandelianum, also known as the Coromandel Tree Mallow, is a plant species that belongs to the family Malvaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting skin health. Herbal preparations of Malvastrum coromandelianum can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and powders, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions, including digestive issues and wounds.
